title: Password reset email not received
issue: Customer could not find the password reset email.
resolution: Agent asked the customer to check spam and confirmed the correct email address before sending a new reset link.

title: Order tracking not updating
issue: Customer saw no tracking updates for two days.
resolution: Agent explained that carrier scans can be delayed and shared the latest shipment status from the order page.

title: Refund delayed
issue: Customer expected a refund but did not see it in their bank account.
resolution: Agent confirmed the refund was approved and explained that banks may take several business days to post it.

title: Order cancellation request
issue: Customer wanted to cancel an order after placing it.
resolution: Agent checked the order status and cancelled it because it had not been packed yet.

title: Shipping address change
issue: Customer entered the wrong shipping address.
resolution: Agent updated the shipping address because the order had not shipped yet.
